title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: repairman29/chump
summary: Self-hosted AI coding agent with persistent memory and bounded autonomy. Local-first, your keys, your data. Written in Rust.

title: apocas/restai
summary: RESTai is an AIaaS (AI as a Service) open-source platform. Supports many public and local LLM suported by Ollama/vLLM/etc. Precise embeddings usage, tuning, analytics etc. Built-in image/audio generation with dynamic loading generators. Live chat deployment. Built-in block based graphical language. Prompt versioning and much more...

summary: 🐦‍⬛ Decentralized development agent platform with on-chain identity and encrypted inter-agent communication via Algorand

title: garudust-org/garudust-agent
summary: 🦅 Open-source self-improving AI agent in Rust — persistent memory, skill learning, tool hub, multi-platform bots & production gateway

title: dyad-sh/dyad
summary: Local, open-source AI app builder for power users ✨ v0 / Lovable / Replit / Bolt alternative 🌟 Star if you like it!

title: hsaghir/looplet
summary: The tool-calling loop for LLM agents; iterator-first, protocol-hooked, one dependency.

title: open-webui/open-webui
summary: User-friendly AI Interface (Supports Ollama, OpenAI API, ...)

title: Josiahxix957/1.0claude-kimi-cloud-workspace

title: coldcraft/printbot

title: cocopadrainplug882/local-study-os

title: Cerid-AI/quenchforge
summary: Local LLM, embedding, reranker, and Whisper inference for Mac + AMD discrete GPU. Ollama- and OpenAI-compatible HTTP APIs. Apache-2.0.

title: LearningCircuit/local-deep-research
summary: ~95% on SimpleQA (e.g. Qwen3.6-27B on a 3090). Supports all local and cloud LLMs (llama.cpp, Ollama, Google, ...). 10+ search engines - arXiv, PubMed, your private documents. Everything Local & Encrypted.

title: romanr3314/designpull
summary: Extract design systems from any website using AI vision to generate Google Stitch compatible DESIGN.md files.
